description: Control a web browser: navigate, screenshot, extract text, click elements, type text, run JavaScript, save PDFs, list/switch tabs. Supports standalone headless mode and live-connect to a running browser.

url.description: URL to navigate to (required for navigate action)

selector.description: CSS selector for click, type, or screenshot actions

selectors.description: List of CSS selectors for extract action

text.description: Text to type into an element (required for type action)

script.description: JavaScript code to evaluate in the page (required for evaluate action)

path.description: File path to save PDF (optional, defaults to temp file for pdf action)

tab_id.description: Tab index to switch to (required for switch_tab action)

connect_url.description: WebSocket URL to connect to an already-running browser (e.g., ws://127.0.0.1:9222/...). If omitted, launches a headless browser.
